name: Cranberry-Glazed Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 sirloin pork roast, extra-lean and boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mash the cranberry sauce with a fork or potato masher.
2. Stir in sugar, cranberry juice cocktail, mustard, and ground cloves.
3. Place the pork roast in a slow cooker and pour the cranberry sauce mixture over it.
4. Cook on low setting for 6 to 8 hours, or until the meat is tender. Remove the roast and keep warm.
5. Skim the fat from the liquid in the slow cooker using a metal spoon.
6. Pour 2 cups of the liquid (add water if necessary) into a small saucepan.
7. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
8. Blend cornstarch and cold water in a separate bowl to make a paste. Gradually stir this into the boiling liquid.
9. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
10. Add salt to taste.
11. Serve with pork. Makes 12 servings.
